hero.description: Generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi networks, vCards, SMS, email, and plain text right in your browser. No signup. No subscription. No files sent to our servers. Just generate and download.
hero.cta: Generate a QR Code Now — No Account Needed
hero.subtext: Works on any device. Download as PNG or SVG.

whyWeExist.title: Why We Exist
whyWeExist.problem: Most "free" QR code generators aren't really free!
whyWeExist.detail: You fill in your details, customise the design, go to download — and hit a paywall. Some charge monthly subscriptions. Some slap their branding on your QR code. Some quietly store your data on their servers.
whyWeExist.solution: Simplified QR is different. Everything runs in your browser. Your data is never uploaded anywhere. Generating is free. Downloading is free. Always.
whyWeExist.note: You NEVER need an account to generate QR codes. No watermarks, no branding, no subscriptions.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps. No account. No waiting.
howItWorks.step1Desc1: Type a URL, WiFi password, contact info,
howItWorks.step1Desc3: Nothing is sent to any server.
howItWorks.step2Desc2: Add a logo if you want.
howItWorks.step2Desc3: Preview updates live as you type.
howItWorks.step3Desc1: Click download and save as PNG or SVG.

features.label: What You Can Do
features.title: Every QR code type you need.
features.feature1Desc: Generate QR codes that open any website or link. Perfect for business cards, flyers, menus, and anywhere you want to bridge print and digital.
features.feature2Desc: Let guests connect to your WiFi by scanning a code — no typing required. Supports WPA2, WEP, and open networks.
features.feature3Desc: Share your contact details with a scan. Name, phone, email, and organisation — all saved instantly to the scanner's contacts.
features.feature4Desc: Pre-fill a text message with a recipient number and body text. One scan opens the Messages app ready to send.
features.feature5Desc: Pre-address an email with recipient, subject, and body. Ideal for feedback forms, support requests, and contact pages.
features.feature6Desc: Encode any plain text — notes, coupons, serial numbers, instructions. Simple and universally readable.
features.feature7Desc: Download your QR code as a high-resolution PNG for screens or as a scalable SVG for print. No watermarks. No branding.
features.feature8Desc: Your content never leaves your device. No cloud storage. No third-party access. What you encode is only ever seen by you.

privacy.label: Privacy By Design
privacy.title: Your QR code data is none of our business.
privacy.para1: When you generate a QR code with WiFi passwords, personal contact info, or private URLs in most tools, you're sending that data to a stranger's server. You're trusting their security. Their staff. Their privacy policy buried in 8,000 words of legal text.
privacy.para2: Simplified QR works differently. All processing happens inside your own browser, on your own device. When you generate a QR code, the data never leaves your machine — it doesn't touch our servers because it never gets sent to them.
privacy.para3: No account means no data to breach. No uploads mean no exposure. Simple.

comparison.label: Why We Exist
comparison.title: Why most "free" QR generators aren't actually free
comparison.note: We built Simplified QR because we got tired of the same bait-and-switch. You search for "free QR code generator", you find one, you customise it, you click download — and suddenly it's $12 a month or it adds a watermark. That's not free. Simplified QR will always let you download your QR codes for free.

useCases.title: Built for every everyday use case
useCases.case1: Sharing a website on a flyer
useCases.case2: Guest WiFi at cafes and offices
useCases.case8: Print media linking to online content

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.faq_a1: Yes. Generating QR codes for any content type and downloading them as PNG or SVG are completely free. No trial period, no credit card required, no subscription. We mean it.
faq.faq_q2: Do I need to create an account?
faq.faq_a2: No. You can generate and download a QR code right now without signing up for anything. An optional account may be added in the future for saving history across devices, but the core generator will always be free and require no account.
faq.faq_q3: Is my data uploaded to your servers?
faq.faq_a3: No. Everything runs inside your browser on your own device. The content you encode into QR codes is never sent to our servers. We don't see it, store it, or have any access to it.
faq.faq_q4: Are there watermarks on downloaded QR codes?
faq.faq_a4: No. Your downloaded QR code is clean. No watermarks, no branding added to your files.
faq.faq_q5: What QR code types can I generate?
faq.faq_a5: You can generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi networks (WPA2/WEP/open), vCard contacts, SMS messages, email addresses with subject and body, and plain text. More types may be added over time.
faq.faq_a6: You can download your QR code as a PNG (great for screens, presentations, and social media) or as an SVG (scalable vector format, perfect for print and high-resolution use).
faq.faq_a7: Yes. Once you've loaded Simplified QR in your browser, the generator works without an internet connection. Your QR code history is stored locally on your device.
faq.faq_q8: Is Simplified QR available on mobile?
faq.faq_a8: Yes. Simplified QR works in any modern mobile browser on iOS and Android. You can even install it to your home screen for quick access.
faq.faq_q9: How does Simplified QR make money if it's free?
faq.faq_a9: Simplified QR is sustained by optional donations from users who find it useful and want to support it. That's it. There are no hidden revenue streams that compromise your privacy.

finalCta.subtext: No account. No subscription. No watermarks. No nonsense.
finalCta.cta: Generate Your QR Code — It's Free
finalCta.note: Your data never leaves your browser.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.shortVersionBefore: Simplified QR is built on a simple principle:
privacy.shortVersionAfter: Nothing you generate in Simplified QR is ever uploaded to our servers, stored on our systems, or seen by us. Everything runs inside your browser, on your own device.
privacy.filesP1: When you open a PDF in Simplified QR, the file is loaded directly into your browser using the Web File API. No bytes of that file are transmitted to any server — ours or anyone else's.
privacy.filesP2: When you add text, draw a signature, or make any other edit, those changes are applied locally using PDF.js and related browser-based libraries. Again: no server involved.
privacy.filesP3: When you click download, your edited PDF is generated in your browser and saved directly to your device — just like saving any other file. Nothing is routed through our infrastructure.
privacy.filesP4: Your documents, signatures, and saved files are stored in your browser's local storage (IndexedDB). They are only accessible from the device and browser you used. They are not synced to any cloud. Clearing your browser data will remove them.
privacy.collectIntro: Simplified QR collects minimal, non-personal data to keep the service running and understand basic usage patterns:
privacy.collectItem1Desc: — page views, rough geographic region (country-level), browser type, and device category. This data is aggregated and contains no personally identifiable information.
privacy.collectItem2Desc: — if the editor encounters a technical error, we may log anonymised error information (no file content) to help fix bugs.
privacy.collectItem3Desc: — if you choose to make a donation, payment is handled by our payment processor (Stripe). We do not store your card details. We receive a record of the transaction amount and a non-reversible transaction ID.
privacy.collectOutro: We do not collect names, email addresses, or account information from users of the free editor. We do not sell any data to third parties.
privacy.cookiesText: Simplified QR uses no advertising cookies and no cross-site tracking cookies. We may use a minimal session cookie if you create an optional account, purely to keep you signed in. Analytics data is collected without cookies where possible.
privacy.thirdParty1Desc: — Simplified QR is hosted on Vercel. Vercel receives standard web server logs (IP address, request path, timestamp) for infrastructure purposes. See Vercel's privacy policy for details.
privacy.thirdParty2Desc: — optional donations are processed by Stripe. Your payment data is governed by Stripe's privacy policy.
privacy.rightsText: Because we hold virtually no personal data about you, there is very little to request, correct, or delete. But if you have any questions or concerns about data we might hold, contact us at:
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy occasionally. The date at the top of this page will always reflect when it was last changed. We will never make changes that compromise the core privacy principle: your data is yours and it never leaves your device.
